info.name: delivery-tracker
info.description:
REST API for recording and querying delivery attempt history.

Base URL: {{delivery_tracker_url}} (default: http://localhost:8003)

request.description:
Retrieves all delivery attempts for a specific event.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-42",
    "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
    "channel": "email",
    "status": "DELIVERED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
    "errorMessage": null,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:05"
  }
]
```

Response (404): No attempts found for the given event.

item.name: Get Attempts by Event and Channel

request.description:
Retrieves all delivery attempts for a specific event and channel.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-42",
    "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
    "channel": "email",
    "status": "DELIVERED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
    "errorMessage": null,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:05"
  }
]
```

Response (404): No attempts found.

Retrieves a single delivery attempt by its ID.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
  "userId": "usr-42",
  "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
  "channel": "email",
  "status": "DELIVERED",
  "attemptNumber": 1,
  "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
  "errorMessage": null,
  "createdAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00",
  "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:05"
}
```

Response (404): Attempt not found.

Retrieves all delivery attempts for a specific user within the last 30 days.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-42",
    "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
    "channel": "email",
    "status": "DELIVERED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
    "errorMessage": null,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:05"
  }
]
```

Response (404): No attempts found for the user.

Records a delivery attempt for a notification event.

Response (201):
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
  "userId": "usr-42",
  "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
  "channel": "email",
  "status": "DELIVERED",
  "attemptNumber": 1,
  "messageId": "msg-abc-123",
  "errorMessage": null,
  "createdAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00",
  "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T10:00:00"
}
```

Response (400): Invalid request body.

query.description: ISO-8601 timestamp — only attempts updated after this time are returned. Defaults to 24 hours ago.
Maximum number of attempts to return. Default: 100.

request.description:
Retrieves failed delivery attempts for retry processing, ordered by oldest update first.

Response (200):
```json
[
  {
    "id": 2,
    "eventId": "evt-002-20250101",
    "userId": "usr-99",
    "eventType": "TRANSACTIONAL",
    "channel": "sms",
    "status": "FAILED",
    "attemptNumber": 1,
    "messageId": null,
    "errorMessage": "Provider unavailable",
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T11:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T11:00:03"
  }
]
```
